---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Project Chimera
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Project Chimera.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why would it be useful?

**Example:**
"As a theatre technician, I need to be able to..."

## Proposed Solution

If you have a specific solution in mind, please describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Impact

How would this feature impact the project?

- **Complexity:** [Low/Medium/High]
- **Breaking Change:** [Yes/No]
- **Documentation Required:** [Yes/No]
- **Testing Required:** [Yes/No]

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar features
- [ ] I have described the use case clearly
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to this feature
- [ ] I am willing to write tests for this feature
